overview.name: HTTP Repeat Times
overview.description:
This scenario verifies HTTP request execution inside repeat block using times.
Test flow includes: 1. Execute POST request inside repeat block three times. 2. Create one entity during each iteration. 3. Send GET request after repeat block. 4. Verify that three entities were created in memory. 5. Reset in-memory storage after test.
This scenario validates: - Repeat execution using times attribute - Stable repeated HTTP POST execution - Data accumulation across repeat iterations - Final storage consistency after repeated execution

http.comment: Step 1-2. Create entity inside repeat block
Step 3-4. Verify all repeated entities were created
Step 5. Reset entity storage after repeat times test
